zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathé de Bordeaux於1237年出生在法國阿奎泰吉洛德波迪奧時，她的父親Pierre IV de Bordeaux48歲，母親Assalide de Rancon28歲。她和Amanieu d'Albret至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1281年享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathé de Bordeaux于1237年出生在法国阿奎泰吉洛德波迪奧时，她的父亲Pierre IV de Bordeaux48岁，母亲Assalide de Rancon28岁。她和Amanieu d'Albret至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1281年享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bordeaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aldea, Andre, Andree, Clovis, Jean Claude, Jean-Luc, Leonce.
habitational name from the city of Bordeaux in Gironde, the Latin name of which is Burdigala, of unexplained etymology.

variants.name: Bordeau
meanings: French: topographic name, a derivative of   Borde   ‘hut, smallholding, small farm’. It may also be a habitational name from any of the places called Bordeau.
Altered form of French   Bourdeau  , a variant of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Mathé
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Marta
meanings: contracted form of Märeta, an obsolete variant of Merete . The name is also popular in Sweden.

variants.name: Martha
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathé de Bordeaux was born in 1237, in Bordeaux, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, her father, Pierre IV de Bordeaux, was 48 and her mother, Assalide de Rancon, was 28. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Amanieu d'Albret. She died in 1281, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathé de Bordeaux est née en 1237, à Bordeaux, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, son père, Pierre IV de Bordeaux, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Assalide de Rancon, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Amanieu d'Albret. Elle est décédée en 1281, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathé de Bordeaux 1237 in Bordeaux, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre IV de Bordeaux 48 und ihre Mutter Assalide de Rancon 28. Sie hatte mit Amanieu d'Albret mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1281 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathé de Bordeaux è nata il nel 1237 nel Bordeaux, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Pierre IV de Bordeaux, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Assalide de Rancon, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Amanieu d'Albret. Morì nel 1281, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathé de Bordeauxが1237年にフランスアクイティアインギロンドボルディーウックスで生まれた時，父Pierre IV de Bordeauxは48歳，母Assalide de Ranconは28歳であった。彼女はAmanieu d'Albretとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1281年に44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathé de Bordeaux(이)가 1237년 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 볼도스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre IV de Bordeaux(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Assalide de Rancon(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Amanieu d'Albret(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathé de Bordeaux nasceu em 1237, em Bordeaux, Gironde, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Pierre IV de Bordeaux, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Assalide de Rancon, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Amanieu d'Albret. Ela faleceu em 1281, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathé de Bordeaux родилась в 1237 г. в местности бордокс, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre IV de Bordeaux было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Assalide de Rancon, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Amanieu d'Albret. Она умерла в 1281 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathé de Bordeaux nació en 1237, en Bordeaux, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Pierre IV de Bordeaux, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Assalide de Rancon, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Amanieu d'Albret. Murió en 1281, a la edad de 44 años.
